overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy traversing a decorated wooden bridge and continuing along a dirt path through a rocky, misty valley toward a tribal settlement called Mother's Watch.

scene_state.functional_zone: decorated tribal wooden bridge with carved archways and burning torches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden bridge, passing under decorated archways with tribal carvings and burning torches

entered.detail: large wooden archway with tribal carvings and blue rope bindings marking the bridge entrance
wooden post with burning flame providing light along the bridge
thick blue rope railings supported by wooden posts along the bridge sides
tall wooden support pillar with intricate tribal carvings and blue bindings

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a character across a decorated wooden bridge in a misty mountain environment. The bridge features tribal architectural elements including carved wooden pillars, rope railings, and burning torches. The character walks steadily forward through a series of archways while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley path with scattered vegetation and ancient ruins

events.description: exits the wooden bridge onto a winding dirt path through rocky terrain
location text 'Mother's Watch' appears in the lower left corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through the rocky valley, navigating between boulders and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the rocky valley floor
massive reddish-brown boulders and rock outcroppings lining the path
green leafy trees and dead trees scattered across the hillside
tall rocky spire visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the bridge onto a wide dirt path winding through a hazy, rocky valley. Large boulders and rock formations line both sides of the trail, with scattered trees and vegetation visible. The text 'Mother's Watch' appears on screen, indicating the location name, as the character continues walking toward distant mountain peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching tribal wooden gate structure with tall totem poles

events.description: passes through the large wooden tribal gate structure with totem poles

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the large wooden tribal gate, continuing along the path toward distant structures

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with crossed logs and tribal decorations marking the settlement entrance
tall wooden totem poles with carvings flanking the gate
weeping willow tree with long hanging vines extending over the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large tribal wooden gate structure with tall totem poles marking the entrance to the settlement. After passing through the gate, the path continues past a weeping willow with hanging vines, with rocky outcroppings and distant spires visible ahead. The environment remains an open, sunlit valley with scattered vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, tribal bridge into the expansive, sunlit valley of a mountain settlement. It begins by trailing a character across a decorated wooden bridge, moving through a series of carved archways flanked by rope railings and burning torches amidst a misty atmosphere. As the character emerges from the bridge, the scene opens into a wide, hazy valley where the path winds between large boulders and rocky formations toward distant peaks. The camera then follows the character toward a large tribal gate marked by tall totem poles, passing through the entrance into the settlement of Mother's Watch. Finally, the view shifts past a weeping willow with hanging vines, revealing a landscape of rocky outcroppings and distant spires under a clear sky.
